title: Module 1
content:
Introduction - Taxonomy, Technology and Features of Augmented Reality,
Difference between AR, VR and MR, Challenges with AR, AR Systems and
Functionality, Augmented Reality Methods, Visualization Techniques for
Augmented Reality

title: Module 2
content:
Introduction to AR Tools - Camera Parameters and Calibration, Marker-
Based Augmented Reality – AR Toolkit, Case Study: AR for Human Robot
Communication - AR and Cobots.

title: Module 3
content:
Basic Features and Architecture - VR Input Hardware: Tracking Systems,
Motion Capture Systems, Data Gloves, VR Output Hardware: Visual
Displays

title: Module 4
content:
3D Manipulation Tasks, Manipulation Techniques and Input Devices,
Interaction Techniques for 3D Manipulation, Applications of VR and AR:
Medical Applications - Educational Applications - Public Safety and
Military Applications
